calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-16-2006 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft. Nestor A. Ramos
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED:
Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Response To Interrogatories and Demand For Production of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $271.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanction Against Deft. Nestor A. Ramos
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED:
Plaintiff's Motion For Orders That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters in Plaintiff's Request For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $121.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2005 Set For Trial On Jan-30-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-09-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
